relations.note: Charts/tables use uniform radius instead of the asymmetric accent shape.
Adds within-email orientation consistency to the accent-shape device.

quotes: Approved radius pairs (print): **1.25" & 0.0625"** (large containers/photos), **0.5" & 0.0625"** (banners), **0.4375" & 0.0625"** (small callout boxes).
A rectangle with **selectively enlarged opposite corner radii**; the other two corners keep a slight radius. Used to house callout text and photography.
Approved radius pairs (print): **1.25" & 0.0625"** (large containers/photos), **0.5" & 0.0625"** (banners), **0.4375" & 0.0625"** (small callout boxes).
**[GENERAL] Email px conversions (at 96dpi):** large: 120px & 6px; banner: 48px & 6px; callout: 42px & 6px.

rules.intent: Establish the signature asymmetric-corner container as the recurring brand shape device.
rules.rule_text: The Brand Accent Shape is the core container device: a rectangle with selectively enlarged opposite corner radii, where the other two corners keep a slight radius, used to house callout text and photography. Use only the approved radius pairs — print large containers/photos 1.25" & 0.0625" (radius.accent_shape.large_print), banners 0.5" & 0.0625" (radius.accent_shape.banner_print), small callout boxes 0.4375" & 0.0625" (radius.accent_shape.callout_print); email px conversions at 96dpi are large 120px & 6px (radius.accent_shape.large_email), banner 48px & 6px (radius.accent_shape.banner_email), callout 42px & 6px (radius.accent_shape.callout_email). Apply the large radius to one diagonal pair (e.g., top-left + bottom-right) and the 6px radius to the other pair.

quotes: Be consistent within an email: same diagonal orientation across all sections (default: large radius top-left & bottom-right).

rules.intent: Keep the accent shape visually coherent across a single email.
rules.rule_text: Be consistent within an email: use the same diagonal orientation of the accent-shape radii across all sections. Default: large radius on top-left & bottom-right, 6px radius on the other diagonal pair.

quotes: charts and tables use uniform rounded corners on all four corners
**Exception: charts and tables use uniform rounded corners on all four corners** (not the asymmetric accent shape). [GENERAL: 12px uniform radius.]

rules.intent: Preserve readability of data containers by exempting them from the asymmetric accent shape.
rules.rule_text: Exception: charts and tables use uniform rounded corners on all four corners (chart.container.radius = 12px uniform), not the asymmetric brand accent shape.
